title: iris verna var. verna
intro: Iris verna var. verna, also known as the early purple iris, is a variety of the early purple-flowering iris plant (Iris verna) that grows in the wild in North America. The medicinal properties of Iris verna var. verna include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which are derived from its roots and rhizomes. The health benefits of using Iris verna var. verna include treating colds, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from sore throats and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Iris verna var. verna can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine for their therapeutic properties.
